customManagers.description: uv version (pinned in Dockerfile ARG). Tracked from PyPI because the Dockerfile installs uv via `pip install uv==<ver>` (the official ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv image lacks an armv7 manifest, which we still target).

packageRules.description: Group the aiohttp/aioprometheus pair — they move together.

Group astral-sh/uv updates across the GitHub Action (setup-uv) and the Dockerfile pip-installed package (uv on PyPI) — they release in lockstep. On a uv bump the Dockerfile's per-arch UV_SHA256_* ARGs go stale (Renovate bumps UV_VERSION but can't recompute the companion binary checksums); the postUpgradeTask refreshes them in-branch from the new release's dist-manifest.json, so the bump + hash refresh land in one commit. Self-hosted Renovate CE only (the command must be on RENOVATE_ALLOWED_POST_UPGRADE_COMMANDS); replaces the retired renovate-uv-shas.yml follow-up-commit workflow.
Group the demo stack images (prom/prometheus + grafana/grafana). They're only used by the local demo Compose file, so a single grouped PR keeps the noise down.
